notes: The distributed package should expose one visible skill only.
Bundled scripts, templates, and references live under skills/codex-workbench.
Long-term maintainer evidence lives under docs/maintenance and is packaged for release review.
.workbench-validation is generated validation output and must not be packaged.
Optional enhancement packs are registered in skills/codex-workbench/assets/enhancements.json.
Do not package internal legacy skill backups or Python cache files.
